tests.test_name: Both inputs required before Check Coverage button is enabled
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A user must provide both a user story and test cases before the Check Coverage button becomes interactive, preventing incomplete submissions.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Both inputs required before Check Coverage button is enabled
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Story Coverage page is loaded with no inputs entered
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enters a user story only, then enters test cases
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Button remains disabled with only one input; button becomes enabled only when both inputs are present

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: After submitting both inputs against a mocked valid API, the user sees a results panel and download buttons confirming a successful coverage check.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Coverage API is mocked to return a valid result
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User fills both inputs and clicks Check Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Results panel is visible and download buttons are shown

tests.test_name: Clear button resets all inputs and results
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A user who wants to start over can click Clear to wipe all inputs and hide the results panel, returning the page to its initial state.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Clear button resets all inputs and results
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed on the page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Story input is empty, test input is empty, and the results panel is hidden

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When the coverage API returns a 500 error, the user is shown a meaningful error message rather than a blank or broken results panel.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Coverage API is mocked to return HTTP 500
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User fills both inputs and clicks Check Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: An error message is displayed to the user

tests.test_name: Format selector is present and forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: The format selector is visible to the user and the selected format value is correctly included in the API request payload when coverage is checked.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Format selector is present and forwarded in payload
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Coverage API is mocked with a valid result and the format selector is visible
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects format 'playwright', fills both inputs, and clicks Check Coverage

tests.test_name: Testing layers selection is forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When a user selects a testing layer, that selection is correctly forwarded in the API request payload on coverage check.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Testing layers selection is forwarded in payload
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Coverage API is mocked with a valid result
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects a testing layer, fills both inputs, and clicks Check Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The compare request includes the selected testing layer

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears test case content and filename
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: Switching the test format resets the test case content and filename to prevent mismatched data from being submitted.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing test format clears test case content and filename
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Test input is populated with content
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Test case content is cleared and test case filename is cleared

tests.test_name: Changing test format does not clear story input
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When the user changes the test format, the story input is preserved so the user does not need to re-enter their user story.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing test format does not clear story input
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Story input is populated with content

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: Changing the test format after a coverage result is shown hides the stale results panel to avoid presenting misleading data.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing test format clears coverage result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed

tests.test_name: Changing testing layers clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: Changing the testing layer selection after a result is displayed hides the stale results panel to avoid presenting misleading data.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing testing layers clears coverage result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User changes the testing layer selection

tests.test_name: Changing data dictionary clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: Changing the data dictionary selection after a result is displayed hides the stale results panel to avoid presenting misleading data.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing data dictionary clears coverage result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User changes the data dictionary selection

tests.test_name: Editing story input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When a user edits the story input after viewing a result, the results panel is hidden so only up-to-date coverage data is shown.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Editing story input clears coverage result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed

tests.test_name: Editing test input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When a user edits the test input after viewing a result, the results panel is hidden so only up-to-date coverage data is shown.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Editing test input clears coverage result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed

tests.test_name: Story input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A user's story input is preserved in state so that navigating away and returning to the page does not lose their entered text.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Story input persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has entered a user story on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User navigates to another page and returns to Story Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Story input still contains the previously entered text

tests.test_name: Test input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A user's test case input is preserved in state so that navigating away and returning to the page does not lose their entered text.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Test input persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has entered test cases on the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User navigates to another page and returns to Story Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Test input still contains the previously entered text

tests.test_name: Selector state persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A user's format and testing layer selections are preserved so that navigating away and returning to the page restores their chosen configuration.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Selector state persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has selected a test format and a testing layer
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User navigates to another page and returns to Story Coverage
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Format selection and testing layer selection are both unchanged

tests.test_name: Coverage result persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: A previously generated coverage result remains visible when the user navigates away and returns, avoiding the need to re-run the check.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Coverage result persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is currently displayed
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User navigates to another page and returns to Story Coverage

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Story Coverage page before each scenario to establish a clean starting state.

tests.journey: When a user logs out, all Story Coverage page state is cleared so that a subsequent session starts fresh with no residual data.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in, on the Story Coverage page, with a user story and test cases entered
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User logs out and returns to the Story Coverage page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Story input and test input are both empty
